name: King Bus Transportation Co
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State (Bizapedia mirror) - Entity ID 2293515; legal name KING BUS TRANSPORTATION COMPANY; principal address 8 NOTTINGHAM PARK, FOLCROFT, PA 19032
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found under multiple name variations (KING BUS, KING BUS TRANSPORTATION, KING TRANSPORTATION). The only PA 'King Transportation' SAFER record (USDOT 1670908, Philadelphia) is a different DBA (Kevin Mitchell) at 565 1/2 Rosalie St with 1 power unit and is not a confident match. Company is likely an intrastate-only PA school bus contractor (operating since 1982) not required to register with FMCSA. PA DOS entity record confirms active status and address match.
